compiled_state.title: RED — Test resolve-model-id.sh validates all three model tier keys
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
Write tests/scripts/test-resolve-model-id.sh testing:
1. Config with all three model.* keys → exit 0 + correct model ID for each tier
2. Config missing model.opus → exit non-zero + error mentioning "model.opus"
3. Config with no model.* keys → exit non-zero
4. Invalid tier name → exit non-zero
5. Tier "sonnet" returns sonnet ID not haiku
Uses fixture config files (temp dirs), not real dso-config.conf.

TDD: RED test task. Tests fail because resolve-model-id.sh does not exist.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (RED-marked tests tolerated)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/scripts/test-resolve-model-id.sh
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-resolve-model-id.sh
- [ ] At least 5 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/scripts/test-resolve-model-id.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry maps resolve-model-id.sh to this test
  Verify: grep -q 'resolve-model-id' .test-index
- [ ] RED marker [test-resolve-model-id] in .test-index
  Verify: grep -q '\[test-resolve-model-id\]' .test-index
